body:
## SDK Generation Started 🚀

SDK generation pipelines have been triggered for all 5 languages. The API spec PR [#42171](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/pull/42171) has been merged.

| Language | Pipeline |
|----------|----------|
| Python | [Build 6186933](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6186933) |
| .NET | [Build 6186934](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6186934) |
| JavaScript | [Build 6186935](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6186935) |
| Java | [Build 6186937](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6186937) |
| Go | [Build 6186941](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6186941) |

Monitoring pipelines for completion. SDK pull request links will be posted once available.

## SDK Generation Complete ✅

SDK pull requests have been successfully generated for all languages.

| Language | SDK Pull Request | Package |
|----------|-----------------|---------|
| Python | [azure-sdk-for-python#46378](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46378) | `azure-mgmt-computelimit` |
| .NET | [azure-sdk-for-net#58310](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58310) | `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit` |
| JavaScript | [azure-sdk-for-js#38194](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38194) | `@azure/arm-computelimit` |
| Java | [azure-sdk-for-java#48855](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48855) | `azure-resourcemanager-computelimit` |
| Go | [azure-sdk-for-go#26619](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26619) | `sdk/resourcemanager/computelimit/armcomputelimit` |

sdk pr for Python: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46378
sdk pr for .NET: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58310
sdk pr for JavaScript: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38194
sdk pr for Java: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48855
sdk pr for Go: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26619

All PRs are currently in **draft** status. The release plan has been updated with the SDK generation details.
